case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR VS. GUNTER JEREMY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT(EJ-190) AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT (EJ-195) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR SERVED MAY-30-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY K. DAVID L. DONAHUE JR.--SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER $5,056.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,528.83 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.82
DECLARATION UPDATE ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,528.83 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY, GUNTER
